title: WorkflowAdministrators
description: The explicit, mutable administration record for a base workflow id (design §13/§14.2): the set of ADMINISTRATOR IDENTITIES entitled to publish further versions of the workflow and to manage its administration. An identity is a set of unforgeable, deployment-stamped tags (e.g. sys:tenant=acme) — never author-supplied. Absent for a workflow whose administration has never been mutated, in which case administration defaults to the administrator identity that stamped version 1; the first add-administrator/transfer materializes this record. Backends store this document verbatim, keyed by baseWorkflowId.

baseWorkflowId.description: The base workflow id this administration record governs (no -vN suffix).

administrators.description: The set of administrator identities; ANY one of them may publish a new version or mutate this administration record. Never empty — the last administrator cannot be removed.

createdBy.description: The actor that first materialized the explicit administration record.

createdAt.description: When the explicit administration record was first materialized.

lastUpdatedBy.description: The actor that last changed the administrator set, if any.

lastUpdatedAt.description: When the administrator set was last changed, if ever.

etag.description: The optimistic-concurrency token for the administrator set.

AdministratorIdentity.title: AdministratorIdentity
AdministratorIdentity.description: A single administrator identity: the set of unforgeable, deployment-stamped security tags (§14.2) that identifies one owning principal, optionally annotated with the resolved grantee's kind and display label (§16.5.4). A submitter whose stamped administrator tags equal this set (as a set) is an administrator. An empty tag set denotes the unscoped (system) administrator.

tags.description: The identity's security tags (KVP labels). Order-independent; compared as a set. This is the authoritative identity; the digest and membership derive from it.

kind.description: The resolved grantee kind this identity was named as (§16.5.4), for display. Optional — absent for identities recorded via the interim single-grant path or before resolved-grantee capture.

label.description: An optional human-friendly display label for the resolved grantee (e.g. a person's name). Display-only; never part of identity matching.

SecurityTagInfo.title: SecurityTagInfo
SecurityTagInfo.description: A security label (KVP) forming part of an administrator identity (§14.2).
